member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.AmendmentsApiClient
member.summary: Implementation of the Amendments API client.
member.param: The HTTP client to use for API requests.
The logger for this client.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.AmendmentsApiClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.AmendmentsApiClient})
member.summary: Implementation of the Amendments API client.
member.param: The HTTP client to use for API requests.
The logger for this client.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.DiscourseApiClient
member.summary: HTTP client implementation for the Discourse API.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.DiscourseApiClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The HTTP client.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.DocumentsApiClient
member.summary: Implementation of the Documents API client.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.DocumentsApiClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.DocumentsApiClient})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified HTTP client and logger.
member.param: The instance used to send HTTP requests.
The instance used to log diagnostic messages.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.DocumentsApiClient.Logs.UploadFailed(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Net.HttpStatusCode,System.String)
member.summary: Logs "Failed to upload document. Status: {StatusCode}, Error: {Error}" at "Error" level.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.DocumentsApiClient.Logs.UploadError(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Logs "Error uploading document {FileName}" at "Error" level.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IAmendmentsApiClient
member.summary: Amendments API client interface for managing amendments in the core platform.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IAmendmentsApiClient.GetAmendmentsAsync(System.String,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Filters.AmendmentsQueryFilter},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all amendments for a specific idea.
member.param: The identifier of the idea to get amendments for.
The query specification for pagination and filtering.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A page of amendments for the specified idea.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IAmendmentsApiClient.GetAmendmentDetailsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets detailed information about a specific amendment.
member.param: The identifier of the amendment to retrieve.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The amendment details if found; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IAmendmentsApiClient.GetAmendmentSupportersAsync(System.String,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec{System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets supporters for a specific amendment with pagination support.
member.param: The identifier of the amendment to get supporters for.
The pagination query specification.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A paginated response of supporters for the specified amendment.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IAmendmentsApiClient.GetAmendmentOpponentsAsync(System.String,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec{System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets opponents for a specific amendment with pagination support.
member.param: The identifier of the amendment to get opponents for.
The pagination query specification.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A paginated response of opponents for the specified amendment.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IAmendmentsApiClient.GetAmendmentTrendAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets support trend data for a specific amendment.
member.param: The identifier of the amendment to get trend data for.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: Support trend data for the specified amendment.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IAmendmentsApiClient.ProposeAmendmentAsync(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.ProposeAmendmentRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Proposes a new amendment for an idea.
member.param: The identifier of the idea to propose an amendment for.
The amendment proposal request.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IAmendmentsApiClient.SupportAmendmentAsync(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.SupportAmendmentRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds support for an amendment.
member.param: The identifier of the amendment to support.
The request containing the reason for supporting the amendment.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The updated support and opposition counts for the amendment.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IAmendmentsApiClient.OpposeAmendmentAsync(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.OpposeAmendmentRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds opposition to an amendment.
member.param: The identifier of the amendment to oppose.
The request containing the reason for opposing the amendment.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The updated support and opposition counts for the amendment.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IAmendmentsApiClient.WithdrawSupportAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Withdraws support for an amendment.
member.param: The identifier of the amendment to withdraw support from.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The updated support and opposition counts for the amendment.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IAmendmentsApiClient.WithdrawOppositionAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Withdraws opposition to an amendment.
member.param: The identifier of the amendment to withdraw opposition from.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The updated support and opposition counts for the amendment.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IdeasApiClient
member.summary: Implementation of the Ideas API client.
member.param: The HTTP client to use for API requests.
The logger for this client.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IdeasApiClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IdeasApiClient})
member.summary: Implementation of the Ideas API client.
member.param: The HTTP client to use for API requests.
The logger for this client.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IDiscourseApiClient
member.summary: Client for interacting with the Discourse API.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IDiscourseApiClient.GetContributionsByThreadIdAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorDirection,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets root contributions for a specific thread using cursor-based pagination.
member.param: The ID of the thread.
Cursor for pagination (null for first page).
Maximum number of contributions to return.
Direction of pagination.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IDiscourseApiClient.GetContributionRepliesAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorDirection,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets replies for a specific contribution using cursor-based pagination.
member.param: The ID of the contribution to get replies for.
Cursor for pagination (null for first page).
Maximum number of replies to return.
Direction of pagination.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IDiscourseApiClient.PostContributionToThreadAsync(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.PostContributionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Posts a new contribution to a specific thread.
member.param: The ID of the thread to post to.
The contribution posting request.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The response containing the created contribution ID.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IDiscourseApiClient.GetContributionsByEntityAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.CursorDirection,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets contributions for a specific entity with cursor-based pagination.
member.param: The type of entity (e.g., "idea", "signal", "action").
The ID of the entity.
Cursor for pagination (null for first page).
Maximum number of contributions to return.
Direction of pagination.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IDocumentsApiClient
member.summary: Client interface for the Documents API.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IDocumentsApiClient.StoreDocumentAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stores a document in the system.
member.param: The file to store.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The unique identifier of the stored document.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IDocumentsApiClient.GetDocumentContentAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets document content as a stream.
member.param: The document identifier.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IDocumentsApiClient.GetDocumentMetadataAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets document metadata.
member.param: The document identifier.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IIdeasApiClient
member.summary: Client interface for interacting with the Ideas API.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IIdeasApiClient.GetIdeasAsync(BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Filters.IdeasQueryFilter},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all ideas for the current locality.
member.param: The query specification for pagination and filtering.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IIdeasApiClient.GetIdeaAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a specific idea by its identifier in the current locality.
member.param: The identifier of the idea.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.IIdeasApiClient.AuthorIdeaAsync(BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.AuthorIdeaRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new idea in the current locality.
member.param: The idea creation request.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISignalsApiClient
member.summary: Client interface for interacting with the Signals API.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISignalsApiClient.GetSignal(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a specific signal by its ID in the current locality.
member.param: The ID of the signal to retrieve.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISignalsApiClient.GetSignals(BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Filters.SignalsQueryFilter},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all signals for the current locality.
member.param: The query specification for pagination and filtering.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISignalsApiClient.CaptureSignal(BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.CaptureSignalRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new signal in the current locality.
member.param: The signal creation request.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISignalsApiClient.AmplifySignal(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.AmplifySignalRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Amplifies a signal by a participant.
member.param: The ID of the signal to amplify.
The amplification request.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISignalsApiClient.DeamplifySignal(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deamplifies a signal by a participant.
member.param: The ID of the signal to deamplify.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISignalsApiClient.GetSignalAmplificationTrendAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets amplification trend data for a specific signal.
member.param: The ID of the signal to get trend data for.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISignalsApiClient.SuggestAction(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.SuggestActionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Suggests an action on a signal.
member.param: The ID of the signal.
The action suggestion request.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISignalsApiClient.GetActionTypes(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all available action types.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The ordered list of available action types.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISocietiesApiClient
member.summary: Client interface for interacting with the Societies API.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISocietiesApiClient.GetSocietiesAsync(BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Filters.SocietiesQueryFilter},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a paginated list of societies with optional filtering.
member.param: The query specification for pagination and filtering.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A page of society list items.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISocietiesApiClient.GetSocietyAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a single society by its identifier.
member.param: The identifier of the society.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISocietiesApiClient.GetSocietyMembersAsync(System.String,BindingChaos.Infrastructure.Querying.PaginationQuerySpec{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Filters.EmptyFilter},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the active members of a society.
member.param: The identifier of the society.
The query specification for pagination.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A page of society member responses.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISocietiesApiClient.CreateSocietyAsync(BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.CreateSocietyRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new society.
member.param: The society creation request.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The ID of the created society.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISocietiesApiClient.JoinSocietyAsync(System.String,BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Contracts.Requests.JoinSocietyRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Joins a society on behalf of the authenticated participant.
member.param: The identifier of the society to join.
The join request containing the agreed social contract ID.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The ID of the created membership.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISocietiesApiClient.GetMySocietyIdsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the IDs of all societies the authenticated participant is an active member of. Returns an empty array for unauthenticated requests.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: An array of society ID strings.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ISocietiesApiClient.LeaveSocietyAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes the authenticated participant's membership from a society.
member.param: The identifier of the society to leave.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ITagsApiClient
member.summary: Defines methods for retrieving and filtering global tags.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ITagsApiClient.GetTags(System.Int32,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a collection of global tags, optionally filtered by a search term.
member.param: The maximum number of tags to return. Must be a positive integer.
An optional search term used to filter the tags. If specified, only tags matching this term are included in the results.
A token to cancel the operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering API clients in the dependency injection container.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSignalsApiClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Adds the Signals API client to the service collection.
member.param: The service collection.
The base address for the API.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddIdeasApiClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Adds the Ideas API client to the service collection.
member.param: The service collection.
The base address for the API.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddAmendmentsApiClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Adds the Amendments API client to the service collection.
member.param: The service collection.
The base address for the API.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddDiscourseApiClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Adds the Discourse API client to the service collection.
member.param: The service collection.
The base address for the API.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddDocumentsApiClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Adds the Documents API client to the service collection.
member.param: The service collection.
The base address for the API.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddTagsApiClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Adds the Tags API client to the service collection.
member.param: The service collection.
The base address for the API.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSocietiesApiClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Adds the Societies API client to the service collection.
member.param: The service collection.
The base address for the API.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.SignalsApiClient
member.summary: Implementation of the Signals API client.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.SignalsApiClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.SignalsApiClient})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SignalsApiClient class.
member.param: The HTTP client to use for API requests.
The logger for this client.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.SignalsApiClient.GetSignal(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific signal by its ID.
member.param: The ID of the signal to retrieve.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the SignalContract for the specified signal.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.SocietiesApiClient
member.summary: Implementation of the Societies API client.
member.param: The HTTP client to use for API requests.
The logger for this client.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.SocietiesApiClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.SocietiesApiClient})
member.summary: Implementation of the Societies API client.
member.param: The HTTP client to use for API requests.
The logger for this client.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.TagsApiClient
member.summary: Provides a client for interacting with the tags API, enabling operations such as creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting tags.
member.param: The HTTP client used to send requests to the tags API. Must be configured with the appropriate base address and authentication settings.
The logger used to record information and errors related to tag API operations.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.TagsApiClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BindingChaos.CorePlatform.Clients.TagsApiClient})
member.summary: Provides a client for interacting with the tags API, enabling operations such as creating, retrieving, updating, and deleting tags.
member.param: The HTTP client used to send requests to the tags API. Must be configured with the appropriate base address and authentication settings.
The logger used to record information and errors related to tag API operations.
